Agibuild.Fulora
Table of Contents

Class RemoteConfigProvider

Namespace
Agibuild.Fulora
Assembly
Agibuild.Fulora.Runtime.dll

Config provider that fetches from a remote HTTP endpoint and merges with a local fallback. Remote values override local values.

public sealed class RemoteConfigProvider : IConfigProvider
Inheritance
object
RemoteConfigProvider
Implements
IConfigProvider
Inherited Members

object.Equals(object, object)

object.GetType()
object.ReferenceEquals(object, object)
object.ToString()

Constructors

RemoteConfigProvider(HttpClient, Uri, IConfigProvider?)

Creates a provider that fetches config from a remote URI and optionally falls back to a local provider.

public RemoteConfigProvider(HttpClient httpClient, Uri remoteUri, IConfigProvider? localFallback = null)

Parameters

httpClient HttpClient

The HTTP client used to fetch remote config.

remoteUri Uri

The URI to fetch JSON config from.

localFallback IConfigProvider

Optional local provider for keys not present in remote config.

Methods

GetSectionAsync(string, CancellationToken)

Gets a section (nested object) as key-value pairs, or null if the key is missing or not an object.

public Task<IReadOnlyDictionary<string, string>?> GetSectionAsync(string key, CancellationToken ct = default)

Parameters

key string
ct CancellationToken

Returns

Task<IReadOnlyDictionary<string, string>>

GetValueAsync(string, CancellationToken)

Gets a raw string value for the given key, or null if missing.

key string
ct CancellationToken

Returns

Task<string>

Gets and deserializes a value for the given key, or null if missing.

IsFeatureEnabledAsync(string, CancellationToken)

Returns true if the feature is enabled (truthy value in config).
